D4 Colorimetry L6 Create Reference

CIECAM16 vs CIECAM02

the 2016 update folds the adaptation into a single matrix — drive the conditions and watch how little the correlates actually move

CIECAM16 (CIE 248:2022) repairs CIECAM02's numerical quirks by replacing the CAT02 matrix and the separate Hunt-Pointer-Estévez step with one CAT16 matrix. The correlate maths is otherwise identical — so the two models track each other closely across normal viewing conditions.

Set the stimulus hue and viewing conditions. The dial plots CIECAM16 (solid) against CIECAM02 (faint); the bars give the CIECAM16 correlates. The readout reports the lightness and chroma gap between the two models.
